mapper.sql: id, report_id, share_token, access_level, expires_at, revoked_at, created_by, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM report_share WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT share.id, share.report_id, share.share_token, share.access_level, share.expires_at, share.revoked_at, share.created_by, share.created_at FROM report_share share JOIN report ON report.id = share.report_id WHERE share.share_token = #{shareToken} AND share.revoked_at IS NULL AND (share.expires_at IS NULL OR share.expires_at > #{now}) AND report.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM report_share WHERE report_id = #{reportId} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > #{now}) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
